title: Nature's Catalysis
description: Combine pieces into powerful weapons, mix and match special abilities based on Nature and Mobs!
body:
Combine magical weapon pieces into powerful special weapons! Mix and match in whichever way you want, all weapon pieces can be procedurally combined with others without limitations!

Patchouli is highly recommended, as this mod includes a Guide Book given on first join or with this recipe:

![150 Possible combinations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0277b79e6f363253944b564f372bd7f7320616c8.png) Obtain Weapon Pieces with special abilities, combine them with any other without limitation, and create your own custom Natural Weapon!

You can start creating Natural Weapons right after getting iron, as all you will need is some Sharp Scissors to get mob pieces, and a Natural Weapon Crafting Station to put them together! Use the guidebook provided with Patchouli to get some extra information on how to start creating weapons!

While some pieces are just used to increase your weapon base stats, most pieces have powerful and unique abilities. The effects are also designed to work with each other. Watch this video to see how only changing one piece to another makes the effect wildly different, while also increasing the weapons power:

![Repairing Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41429a58ac65f6165135b47ee5d22562727bb01f.png) You can repair Natural Weapons by using the pieces you created them with, repairing for half the durability of the piece you are using for repair!
